Project Overview: Supermercado Janet

Status: In Progress

The goal is to create a professional, culturally authentic sales circular for Supermercado Janet in Fennville, MI. We are moving away from "plain boxes" towards a high-energy "Sales Circular" look that jumps off the page.

1. The Professional Goal

We are aiming for the "Sale Circular" energy found in these examples:

Burton Meat Farm (Clean & Structured)

Poco Loco (Vibrant & High Energy)

2. Current Progress

We have implemented category headers, corner price flags, and fixed the print scaling issues.

3. The "Clipping" Problem

We are currently fixing the alignment issues seen here, where broken images and labels are overlapping incorrectly.

Technical Accomplishments

  • Print Scaling: Fixed the 1.5" border issue. Flyer now prints edge-to-edge.
  • Native Integration: Prepared for macOS/iOS wrapper via XcodeGen.
  • Design: Moved to categorized sections with sale tags.
